variants.text: I gave you the card, kid! Go enjoy the high life while I keep this bass dropping.
Look at this floor. It's a graveyard. Go buy some people drinks or something, I'm not handing out passes to a dead club.
Look at this floor. It's a graveyard. Go buy some people drinks or something, I'm not handing out passes to a dead club.
The energy in here is mid! I can't work like this! If someone doesn't start moving, I'm staying locked in this booth all night.

options.text: Don't look now, but the DJ is three toddlers in a trench coat.

passedGame.text: Ayyy! That's what I'm talking about! You saved the set. Take this VIP pass. The Boss is in the lounge.

failedGame.text: You've got the rhythm of a wet noodle. You're killing the vibe! Here, take a shot-maybe it'll loosen those hips.
